---
title: "Marginal costs"
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F)

library(Dispatching)
library(magrittr)
```




### Worker side and clint firm side marginal costs

#### Linear

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/estimation_result/small_markets/mc_residual_linear.png"))
```

#### Linear ridge

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/estimation_result/small_markets/mc_residual_linear_ridge.png"))
```

#### Log

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/estimation_result/small_markets/mc_residual_log.png"))
```

#### Log ridge

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/estimation_result/small_markets/mc_residual_log_ridge.png"))
```

#### Log linear

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/estimation_result/small_markets/mc_residual_log_linear.png"))
```

#### Log linear ridge

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/estimation_result/small_markets/mc_residual_log_linear_ridge.png"))
```
